title: Paragraph cohesion
subtitle: Make a written paragraph feel connected.
duolingoBridge: B1 Hi moves from controlled B1 into native-style but accessible French: short articles, real conversations, nuanced opinions, and longer connected output.
overview: Knowledge point 1: use logical links between sentences.
Knowledge point 2: avoid a list of disconnected ideas.

items.fr: Tout d’abord, une bonne méthode doit être facile à commencer.
items.en: First of all, a good method must be easy to start.
items.es: En primer lugar, un buen método debe ser fácil de empezar.

items.fr: De plus, elle doit permettre de mesurer de petits progrès.
items.en: Moreover, it must make it possible to measure small progress.
items.es: Además, debe permitir medir pequeños progresos.

items.fr: Cependant, elle ne doit pas devenir trop répétitive.
items.en: However, it must not become too repetitive.
items.es: Sin embargo, no debe volverse demasiado repetitiva.

items.fr: C’est pourquoi il est utile de changer parfois de thème.
items.en: That is why it is useful to sometimes change the topic.
items.es: Por eso es útil cambiar a veces de tema.

items.fr: En définitive, la cohérence d’un paragraphe vient autant des idées que des connecteurs.
items.en: Ultimately, the coherence of a paragraph comes as much from ideas as from connectors.
items.es: En definitiva, la coherencia de un párrafo viene tanto de las ideas como de los conectores.
